content.speakerText: So to confirm: $48/unit, 10K units, 30% upfront, split shipments, 12-month contract?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下：单价48美元，一万件，30%预付，分批交货，签一年合同？
expectedAnswers: Exactly — that’s the deal. I’ll send the contract by EOD.
Yes, that’s correct. I’ll follow up with the legal team to finalize the documents by tomorrow.
Perfect. We’re aligned. First shipment on Monday, contract by end of day.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确复述并确认所有条款（价格、数量、付款、交货、合同期限）
是否使用专业表达（如 EOD, finalize, shipment）避免口语化错误
是否明确下一步行动，体现专业性和执行力

content.speakerText: We’re really glad we could find common ground — this could be the start of something big.
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴我们找到了共识，这可能是大合作的开始。
expectedAnswers: Same here — your team’s flexible and professional. Let’s keep the momentum going.
I really appreciate your responsiveness and openness. Looking forward to a long-term partnership.
Absolutely. Your support during negotiations made this possible. Let’s touch base in four weeks to plan the next steps.
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了‘达成共识’的情感，并表达积极态度
是否使用具体赞美（如 flexible, responsive, openness）而非泛泛而谈（如 great, good）
是否提出延续合作的行动建议，增强关系纽带

content.speakerText: Let’s wrap this up — final terms: $52/unit, 12K units, 20% deposit, monthly delivery, 24-month contract.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们来收尾吧——最终条款：单价52美元，1.2万件，20%定金，每月交货，24个月合同。
expectedAnswers: Confirmed. I’ll send the signed contract by 5 PM today and confirm the first delivery date with logistics.
Sounds good. We’re excited about this partnership and will prepare our production schedule accordingly.
Agreed. Thank you for your clarity and collaboration — we’ll keep you updated on our progress.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确表示接受最终条款，无模糊或保留意见
是否使用场景关键词（contract, deposit, delivery, partnership）
是否体现专业、积极、有行动力的语气，符合商业沟通规范
